# osmtraces

The goal of osmtraces is to help with downloading publicly available
traces from OpenStreetMaps

## Installation

You can install the development version of osmtraces like so:

``` r

remotes::install_github("heike/osmtraces")
```

## Example

This is a basic example which shows you how to solve a common problem:

``` r

library(osmtraces)
## basic example code
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`download_osm_tracks()`](download_osm_tracks.md) : Download all
  public traces from a geographic location
- [`gps_heading()`](gps_heading.md) : Derive heading based on
  consecutive geographic locations
- [`gps_speed_mph()`](gps_speed_mph.md) : Derive speed based on
  geographic location
- [`read_gpx()`](read_gpx.md) : Read OSM traces from a gpx file
- [`read_osm_traces()`](read_osm_traces.md) : Read pre-downloaded traces
  from a folder
- [`segmentize()`](segmentize.md) : Turn a track into multiple segments
- [`trace_to_df()`](trace_to_df.md) : Convert a trace into a data frame
